what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment tied to a channel and a target image URI.

Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added timestamp
Target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/recent-pitches/p-49
Added timestamp is precise ISO 8601 with timezone
standouts: Target references a specific pitch image 'p-49'

image:// URI scheme for asset target
concerns: No content hash, size, or MIME type for the image
No author or provenance beyond timestamp
No title, caption, or alt text
Target URI cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry linking the design-source channel to pitch image p-49.
questions: Is the target image:// URI resolvable in the system?
